## Security Audit Report

### [HIGH] Reentrancy in Vault.withdraw

The withdraw function is vulnerable to reentrancy.
An attacker can re-enter and drain funds.
This is a critical issue.
The function should use a reentrancy guard.
Impact: loss of all deposited funds.
Recommendation: add nonReentrant modifier.
Severity: HIGH.

### [MEDIUM] Missing Input Validation

No zero-address check on recipient.
